description: Perform a Bayesian informative hypothesis test using the Bain module on the Viagra dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Viagra.csv). Evaluate the hypothesis that Libido increases with Dose (Placebo < Low Dose < High Dose). Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Viagra_Bain.jasp and record the resulting Posterior Probability (P(M|data)) for the hypothesis in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/bain_results.txt.
